title: KKTN-012 Business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Alice 20 years old Shiina Alice
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is Alice, a playful little animal girl. The movements are so cute that I can't control my excitement even before I get on the bike! Alice can't afford to talk so much when she starts rowing. He tries his best to row, but it seems that his body is so scared that it is not the case. Don't be shy and feel good! Alice!
